creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 191666
svn diff for x11/menu-cache

I use x11-fm/pcmanfm, and I'd like to look after it.
Given that x11/libfm, and this are also a part of
x11-fm/pcmanfm, and unmaintained. I might as well
take them too.

Please find the svn diff attached.

Thanks!

--Chris
